ham.subject: Account Activity Alert: Recent Transaction
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We are writing to inform you of a recent transaction on your account.

**Transaction Details**
• Date & Time: 2026-04-07 14:32:07 UTC
• Amount: $1,250.00
• Merchant: TechGear Electronics
• Location: 1425 Market St., San Francisco, CA

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this activity, please contact our support team immediately at <URL> or call 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
The Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Hello,

This is an automated notice from Microsoft 365 Security. Your account password is set to expire in 48 hours. Failure to update your password will result in temporary suspension of access to your Microsoft 365 services.

Please log in now to verify and reset your password. Click the link below to proceed:
<URL>

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
